definitions.text: To make happy or satisfy; to give pleasure to.
examples: I'm pleased to see you've been behaving yourself.

definitions.text: To desire; to will; to be pleased by.
examples: He doesn't think, he just says whatever he pleases.

definitions.text: Used to make a polite request.
examples: Would you please sign this form?

definitions.text: Used as an affirmative to an offer.
examples: D'you mind if I open the window? —Please do.

definitions.text: Said as a request to repeat information.
examples: Customer while ordering: Can I get a [unintelligible]? Restaurant employee: Please?
